response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:43: Identified introductory talk between Rinami Himesaki and the demon girl. 2. 01:43-04:59: Detected vocal performance of '36°C U・B・U' by Rinami Himesaki, with credits for music/arrangement to Tsubasa Ito and lyrics to Soflan Daichi. 3. Searched for '36°C U・B・U 歌詞' to get the original Japanese lyrics. 4. Searched for official/verified lyric sources and translations to provide the English translation. Found reliable lyric sources for '36°C U・B・U'. 5. Compiled the full lyrics, original and translated, and formatted them into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introduction by the VTuber Rinami Himesaki (represented by her avatar) and an audience member (a demon girl avatar), followed by a full vocal performance of the song '36°C U・B・U' by Rinami Himesaki on a stage.

scenes.description: Introduction scene where Rinami Himesaki (the performer in the dress) and the demon girl avatar talk on stage before the performance.

Performance of '36°C U・B・U' by Rinami Himesaki. The singer performs on stage while the demon girl watches and cheers from a desk at the side. Song credits appear on screen: 作詞: Soflan Daichi, 作曲/編曲: 伊藤 翼.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
i know, love's border
Shall we try jumping over it just a little bit today?
It feels like I'm watching a story that hasn't started at all [Seeking heaven!]
I'll let you know, you're oblivious
If we keep going like this, you'll be 'Extra A' in the end credits
That gaze that looks away, and the bud of romance that won't sprout no matter how long I wait
[Might as well] 'Hey, hey, lend me your forehead for a bit ♪' Want to decorate our love with that?
[Go ahead] Sudden 'tight squeeze', the heart-throb is cute too, please accept my cue
[Imagining] I want to see a development that goes beyond this
If I'm the one who makes a move, it's too cliché, right?
36°C, caution for you, you naive boy!
I want you to be a little more passionate about me
What on earth am I to you?
Yes, go ahead, from here on, it's your turn
Don't try to say it perfectly
If it's not a little bit unnatural
Love wouldn't have a way to start like that
This and that... in short, it's a love song
Setting aside whether it's good or bad, I'm hoping to be addicted
Want to try being possessed by a slightly high, hot love?
Basic of the basics, the three major cha-cha-chas of love
Chance, Chase, Challenge
Useless messages [Ping ♪], casual touches [Hey, hey]
When translated, everything is, in short, love-u
Don't think with your head, respond with a spinal reflex
Just 'no, no' is no good
Yes, just a little more, one more step
At 3, 2, 1 [Go!]
Cha cha cha cha cha ♪ [Good boy]
You're a kid who can do it if you try, I like you being honest
36°C, caution for you, you dull boy!
Break out of the 3D 'anyway, because, but, but' stuff
Feel lots of otherworldly wonderful things
Yes, go ahead, from here on, it's your turn
Don't get defensive thinking 'Maybe I'm wrong...'
If there isn't a little bit of misunderstanding
Love wouldn't have a way to start like that
'Hey, hey, lend me your forehead for a bit ♪' Want to decorate our love with that?
Sudden 'tight squeeze', the heart-throb is cute too, please accept my cue
I want to entrust my body to a premonition
If I'm the one who makes a move, it's too cliché, right?
36°C, caution for you, you naive boy!
I want you to be a little more passionate about me
I might look relaxed, but I'm at my limit too
Yes, I'll tell you my honest feelings for a bit
Even if I'm a perfect older sister
If there isn't a little bit of a gap
There's no way you could fall in love, right?
That's why I'm waiting for you...
Covered in 'likes', always
Want to try being possessed by a slightly high, hot love?
